=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan October-19-1994 Roseland Ballroom  New York City, New York

Stuck Inside Of Roseland Whit The New York Blues Again 
Front Row 2113


Silver cd>EAC (secure mode)>TLH (level 8)>maketorrent>HC
Artwork incluided

More info:http://www.bobsboots.com/CDs/cd-s71.html

01-If You See Her Say Hello 
02-All Along The Watchtower 
03-You're A Big Girl Now 
04-Tangled Up In Blue 
05-Most Likely You Go Your Way 
06-Mama You Been On My Mind (acoustic w / band) 
07-One Too Many Mornings (acoustic w / band) 
08-It's All Over Now Baby Blue (acoustic w / band) 
09-Stuck Inside Of Mobile 
10-Shelter From The Storm 
11-Maggie's Farm
